name: Ramanas Park
description:
Legendary encounters in Ramanas Park. For the record, any of the randomized ones (birds, dogs, latis) have 1 extra RNG advance happen when you put the slate in.
This is the RNG call to select which of the randomized options it will pick.
When you only have 1 left, this goes away and it becomes like any of the other single-target Ramanas Park legends.
So, typically the delay would need to be 1 less (ie.. 85 down to 84).
